rulings.Case Title: 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. PUBLIC BIKES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Public Bikes
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Public Bikes is GRANTED as requested. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VALMI ASSOCIATES VS. KRISTIN KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT KRISTIN KRAMER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for ejectment. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that any notice (unlike in an unlawful detainer action) is required to state a cause of action for ejectment. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XANTHE ASHER VS. ERIC COLLISSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT ERIC COLLISSON, JENNY COLLISSON Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. The Court has previously ruled that compliance with SFRO is required by the landlord who is moving into the property. Moving party cites no authority for the proposition that for those co-owners who hold the property as community property the rule should be different as a matter of law. Factual and legal differences exclusive to community property ownership may be raised as an issue of fact on an appropriate motion/at trial but is not subject to the pleading attack. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XANTHE ASHER VS. ERIC COLLISSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Limited Action To Unlimited Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF XANTHE ASHER Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Limited Action To Unlimited Action is GRANTED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2255 MARKET, LLC VS. JAMILA AISHA ABNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Pltf'S Second Mtn To Compel Jamila Aisha Abner'S Deposition, Req. For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF 2255 MARKET, LLC Ntc Of Mtn And Pltf'S Second Mtn To Compel Jamila Aisha Abner'S Deposition, Req. For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall appear and sit for a deposition the week of January 6, 2019. Plaintiff to serve a 5-day notice. Sanctions granted as requested. Hearing Required to address why Mr. Driscoll's December 18, 2019 e-mail should not be referred to the California State Bar for consideration. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA LABITORIA VS. ERLINDA SELMA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 02, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SELMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT By no later than January 2, 2020 by 9:00 a.m. Defendant shall file an amended proof of service indicating the manner of service of the motion. Proof of Service on file fails to so indicate. If a valid Proof of Service is filed and presented at the hearing, the demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith issues raised in the demurrer. No opposition filed. If no valid proof of service is filed and presented, the demurrer is order off calendar and Defendant shall file an answer in 5 days. = (501/CFH)
